summary: Configures the NIC, IP, and channel layout for ST 2110 In/Out TOPs. Acts as the central settings hub for a media-over-IP card so the In/Out TOPs can stay parameterless.

key_params.name: ipaddress
key_params.note: Static IP if not using DHCP

key_params.name: ptpdomain
key_params.note: PTP domain number for clock sync

key_params.name: numchannels
key_params.note: Number of channels exposed for In/Out routing

common_gotchas: Only one ST2110 Device CHOP should configure a given NIC — duplicate configs fight over the interface.
PTP domain mismatch is the single most common reason streams don't sync — verify against the master clock setting.
